rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Standalone Test: Malware Campaign
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/19
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '185.220.101.45'
            - '45.33.32.156'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*darknet.org*'
            - '*evil-login.example-malware.com*'
            - '*malware-cdn.evil.net*'
            - '*payload.zip*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_ip
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Standalone_Test__Malware_Campaign {
    meta:
        description = "Standalone Test: Malware Campaign"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "a7ffc6f8bf1ed76651c14756a061d662f580ff4de43b49fa82d80a4b80f8434a" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
suricata: alert ip any any -> 185.220.101.45 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Standalone_Test__Malware_Campa"; sid:7452738; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 45.33.32.156 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Standalone_Test__Malware_Campa"; sid:6504973; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 185.220.101.45 any (msg:"CDB APEX Standalone_Test__Malware_Campa"; sid:8230078; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 45.33.32.156 any (msg:"CDB APEX Standalone_Test__Malware_Campa"; sid:8827150; rev:1;)
